description: User navigates from Google search results to a Skyscanner flight deals page.
frame_description: Transition from Google search to Skyscanner flight deals.

description: User navigates to the task instruction screen.
frame_description: Transition from Skyscanner to a dark task instruction screen.

description: User spends time reading the task instructions regarding planning a holiday to London.
frame_description: User is on the task instruction screen with a dark background and white text.

description: User navigates from the instructions to the Skyscanner flight search homepage.
frame_description: Transition from instructions back to the Skyscanner homepage.

description: User selects 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' as the departure airport from the origin dropdown.
frame_description: The origin dropdown is open with 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' highlighted.

description: User types 'London' into the destination field.
frame_description: The destination field shows 'londo' being typed.

description: User initiates a search for flights from Sunshine Coast to London, navigating to the results page.
frame_description: Transition from the search form to the flight results page.

description: The page displays a loading spinner while searching for flight results from various providers.
frame_description: The search results page shows a 'Searching' status with a loading animation.

description: User examines the flight search results and an advertisement for 'Visit the USA'.
frame_description: Flight search results are visible alongside a large vertical advertisement.
